0% BIZNY v2.0

Welcome to Bizny

Bizny is Africa's deal-making platform — connecting business owners, investors, and skilled professionals in one open community. Browse freely, post opportunities, find partners, and close deals — all in one place.

📋 Post Board — share business needs & browse live opportunities
🤝 Deal Flow — structured deal stages from proposal to delivery
💰 Escrow & Milestones — funds released step by step, safely
📋

The Post Board

The Post Board is Bizny's open marketplace. No account needed to browse. Every post is a real business opportunity — from supply deals to investment proposals to team-building requests.

① Scroll and read posts from business owners across Nigeria
② Submit a proposal or investment offer on any post that interests you
③ The post owner reviews, accepts the best proposal, and a deal begins
④ Create your own post — sign up free and let the community come to you
🔒

Safe Deals, Every Time

Once a proposal is accepted, Bizny structures the entire deal — negotiation, agreement, escrow, and milestone-by-milestone payments. No money changes hands until both sides are satisfied.

💬 Negotiate equity — investors propose their %, owners counter-offer
🔒 Escrow protection — funds locked until milestones are approved
📊 Milestone payments — owner requests amount after each delivery
🤖 AI Co-Pilot — helps you draft proposals, plans & pitch decks
BIZNY
An Open Productivity Ecosystem
